# omniplan_covers_ding

- purpose: Convert OmniPlan CSV exports to DingTalk-compatible Excel (task or requirement)
- version: 0.1.0
- language: Rust (edition 2024)
- portability: NOT portable — depends on external path dep `cli-common`

## Command Syntax

```
omniplan_covers_ding convert <csv-file> <doc-type> [-p <parent>] [-t <liter>] [-l <limit>]
```

## Arguments

- `<csv-file>`: Input CSV file path (required)
- `<doc-type>`: `task` or `require` (required)
- `-p, --parent <value>`: Parent task value
- `-t, --liter <value>`: Liter (iteration) assignment
- `-l, --limit <value>`: Filter in k=v format

## Dependencies

- cli-common (external path: /Users/admin/data0/private_work/crate-r-svr-api/cli-common)
- csv, rust_xlsxwriter, strum, tokio, thiserror

## Build

```bash
cargo build --release
```

## Notes

- Internal tool, not published
- Requires external path dependency, not CI-tested
